creator: Panacea Palm | Dij 🙋🏽‍♂️
source_text:
High Protein Chilli Lime Shrimp Bowls!🍱🍤🤤

50g Protein! ONLY 582 calories, so much flavour🔥💪🏽

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like this one & calorie tracking barcodes!📕👨🏽‍🍳 

Calories & Macros 📊
Per Bowl: 582 calories
50g P | 70g C | 13g F
 
For the Shrimp
- 700g raw shrimp/prawns
- 1 tsp garlic powder
- 1 tsp smoked paprika
- 1 tsp oregano
- 1/2 tsp cayenne
- 1 tsp black pepper
- 1 tsp salt
- Cooking spray (roughly 1 tsp oil)

Mango Pineapple Salsa
- 100g tomato diced
- 1/2 red onion diced
- 150g diced pineapple (I used canned in juice)
- 150g diced mango 
- 2 tbsp coriander/cilantro (chopped)
- 1/2 lime juice 
- Salt to taste

Chilli Lime Sauce
- 100g 0% Greek yoghurt
- 30g light mayo
- 2 tsp sriracha 
- 15ml soy sauce 
- 1 tsp sesame oil 
- 1 tbsp coriander/cilantro (chopped)
- black pepper to taste
- 1/2 lime juice
- 1 tsp honey
- Water for consistency 

Other ingredients
- 6 tbsp mashed avocado (roughly 3/4 avocado)

Storage & Heating ♨️
- if storing, store the mango salsa and sauce separately and don’t add the avocado until eating. meal prep containers with. Refrigerate for up to 4 days 
- To reheat microwave partially covered for 2-3 minutes then add the mango salsa, avocado and the sauce

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like this one & calorie tracking barcodes!📕👨🏽‍🍳 

🏷️ #highprotein #chillilimeshrimp #easyrecipes #lowcalorie

expected.name: High Protein Chilli Lime Shrimp Bowls
raw_ingredients: 150g diced pineapple (I used canned in juice)

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The description provides ingredients plus storage and reheating guidance but no primary preparation method, so this is intentionally an incomplete fallback case.
Accepted after a general trailing-symbol Storage & Heating heading variant; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
